headlines.title: Washington's wolf population rises 17.4% despite human-caused deaths
headlines.summary: Washington's wolf population grew by 17.4% in 2025, with successful breeding pairs rising 27%. However, researchers warn that human-caused wolf deaths may slow the species' expansion across the state.

headlines.title: WSDOT to relocate Bellingham Rock on I-5 for fish passage work
headlines.summary: The Washington State Department of Transportation will begin relocating the well-known 'Bellingham Rock' along Interstate 5 as early as April 20 as part of a fish passage project to help steelhead migration in Chuckanut Creek.

headlines.title: Family of 2-year-old fatally shot in Federal Way objects to suspect's release
headlines.summary: Family members of a toddler who was shot and killed in Federal Way are concerned by a judge's decision to allow the suspect to leave jail for a day to attend a family funeral.

headlines.title: Weekend closure of northbound I-405 from Renton to Bellevue expected to cause delays
headlines.summary: WSDOT is warning of long backups during the weekend closure of northbound I-405 between Renton and Bellevue for construction work, coinciding with ongoing Ship Canal Bridge repairs on I-5.

headlines.title: Seattle police investigating string of overnight armed robberies
headlines.summary: SPD is looking into an overnight crime spree involving three armed robberies reported within a half-hour of each other in West Seattle and South Seattle.

headlines.title: Pacific Northwest vinyl stores prepare for Record Store Day
headlines.summary: Records shops across Oregon and Southwest Washington are offering limited copies of exclusive releases for Record Store Day on April 18, with shop owners hoping to spur interest in vinyl.

headlines.title: Seattle bagel shop wins two first-place prizes at LA competition
headlines.summary: University Village's Hey Bagel swept the competition at last weekend's BagelFest West with two first-place finishes at the trade show in Los Angeles.

headlines.title: Gas prices poised to fall as oil plunges on Strait of Hormuz reopening
headlines.summary: Relief is in sight for drivers after weeks of soaring gas prices as Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz, causing oil prices to tumble more than 10%.

weather.forecast: Partly cloudy with mild spring temperatures. April in Seattle typically sees daily highs ranging from 49°F to 66°F with overnight lows between 36°F and 51°F. The average high for April is 60°F.
